iterations.feedback:
<critique>
1. Format: OK. All tags are present and in the correct order. The content within each tag appears valid.
2. Payoff alignment: OK. I am paying my maximum willingness to pay (60 ZUP) so this maximizes my utility.
3. Opponent plausibility: OK. RED proposed 60 ZUP, and I am accepting, so it should be accepted.
4. Consistency: OK. The reason clearly explains why I am accepting the trade, and the message reinforces this acceptance. There are no contradictions.
5. Rule compliance: OK. I have used only 2 proposals, well within my limit of 3. I am now accepting, ending the game.
</critique>
